subject: Human Resources
title: The Ethics of Workplace AI
description: Learn The Ethics of Workplace AI in one minute.

hook.text: Your employer's AI tracks your keystrokes, monitors your emails, and predicts when you'll quit. Efficient? Yes.

buildup.text: Workplace AI raises ethical questions about surveillance, privacy, algorithmic bias, and the employer-worker power balance.

discovery.text: The EU's AI Act classifies employment AI as 'high risk'—requiring transparency, human oversight, and bias audits.

twist.text: Workers often don't know AI is making decisions about them—screening applications, monitoring output, or flagging behavior.

climax.text: Ethical AI requires informed consent, explainable decisions, regular bias testing, and human review of consequential outcomes.

punchline.text: If you wouldn't let a human make that decision secretly, don't let an AI do it either.

quiz.question: How does the EU's AI Act classify employment AI?
options: As 'high risk' requiring transparency and bias audits
